case_title: SERGIO AGUILA HERNANDEZ VS. TARUNKUMAR K. PATEL ET AL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,750.00 FILED BY HERNANDEZ, SERGIO AGUILA AS TO DEFENDANT PATEL, TARUNKUMAR K. DBA ALEXIS PARK SAN FRANCISCO PATEL, BHULABHAI B DBA ALEXIS PARK SAN FRANCISO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-23-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER TO CONTINUE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-27-2022 - JUDGMENT.
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY PLAINTIFF HERNANDEZ, SERGIO AGUILA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-01-2022 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO MAY-18-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506
STIPULATION FOR JUDGE PRO TEM

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-27-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-27-2022 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE. PLAINTIFF SERGIO AGUILA HERNANDEZ PRESENT ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER KENNETH WRIGHT. DEFENDANT TARUNKUMAR PATEL DBA ALEXIS PARK SAN FRANCISCO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BHULABHAI B. PATEL IS NOT PRESENT AND HAS NOT BEEN SERVED; BHULABHAI PATEL DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AT THE REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF. BOTH SDIES STIPULATE TO BEING HEARD BEFORE A JUDGE PRO TEM. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HERNANDEZ, SERGIO AGUILA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PATEL, TARUNKUMAR K. DBA ALEXIS PARK SAN FRANCISCO $2,300.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,300.00, PLAINTIFF PROVED HIS CLAIM. THE COURT AWARDS $2,300, TO INCLUDE THE AMOUNT OF THE CHECK AT ISSUE PLUS BAD CHECK PENALTIES IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,000, PLUS $50 FOR BANK FEES. SECOND DEFENDANT IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AT REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL(PLANTIFF)
ORDER TO CONTINUE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-17-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO AUG-05-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF SERGIO AGUILA HERNANDEZ IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER MONICA HERNANDEZ VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT TARUNKUMAR K. PATEL DBA ALEXIX PARK SAN FRANCISCO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BHULABHAI B. PATEL DBA ALEXIX PARK SAN FRANCISCO IS NOT PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT BHULABHAI B. PATEL DBA ALEXIX PARK SAN FRANCISCO. INITIALLY THE PLAINTIFF WAS GOING TO DISMISS THE CASE AGAINST THE DEFENDANT WITH NO PROOF OF SERVICE, BUT SINCE PRESENT DEFENDANT SUBMITTED DOCUMENTATION IN ENGLISH THE PLAINTIFF COULD NOT PARTICIPATE IN DISCOVERY OVER ZOOM. THE CASE HAD TO BE CONTINUED WHICH COULD ALLOW PLAINTIFF TO TRY AND SERVED THE DEFENDANT WITHOUT SERVICE. NO FURTHER SERVICE IS REQUIRED ON DEFENDANT TARUNKUMAR K. PATEL DBA ALEXIX PARK SAN FRANCISCO. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-01-2022 - CONTINUED FOR INTERPRETER TO DEC-27-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF SERGIO AGUILA HERNANDEZ IS PRESENT. SPANISH INTERPRETER WAS NOT AVAILABLE FOR TODAY'S MATTER, PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY USING GOOGLE TRANSLATE FOR ENGLISH TO SPANISH TRANSLATION WITH THE CLERK. DEFENDANT TARUNKUMAR K. PATEL DBA ALEXIS PARK SAN FRANCISCO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BHULABHAI B. PATEL DBA ALEXIS PARK SAN FRANCISCO IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT BHULABHAI B. PATEL DBA ALEXIS PARK SAN FRANCISCO HAS NOT BEEN SERVED AND PROOF OF SERVICE IS STILL REQUIRED. NO FURTHER SERVICE IS REQUIRED ON DEFENDANT TARUNKUMAR K. PATEL DBA ALEXIS PARK SAN FRANCISCO. CONTINUED DATE AGREED BY PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00<WAIVED>) SERVED DEC-22-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PATEL, TARUNKUMAR K. DBA ALEXIS PARK SAN FRANCISCO
ORDER TO CONTINUE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE.
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT PATEL, TARUNKUMAR K. DBA ALEXIS PARK SAN FRANCISCO
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-05-2022 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO SEP-01-2022 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506

DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE REMARKS: DEFENDANT IS NOT ASSOCIATED WITH LOCATION PROVIDED BY PLAINTIFF. FILED BY PLAINTIFF HERNANDEZ, SERGIO AGUILA AS TO DEFENDANT PATEL, BHULABHAI B DBA ALEXIS PARK SAN FRANCISO

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-18-2022 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO JUN-17-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506, DUE TO THE UNAVAILABILITY OF A JUDICIAL OFFICER TO HEAR TODAY'S MATTER. PLAINTIFF SERGIO AGUILA HERNANDEZ IS PRESENT AND IS ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPER MONICA HERNANDEZ, CSR#301545. DEFENDANT TARUNKUMAR K. PATEL IS PRESENT. (D.506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-01-2022 - CONTINUED FOR SPANISH INTERPRETER AND FOR PROOF OF SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BHULABHAI B. PATEL DBA ALEXIS PARK SAN FRANCISCO TO NOV-01-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF SERGIO AGUILA HERNANDEZ IS PRESENT. SPANISH INTERPRETER WAS NOT AVAILABLE FOR TODAY'S MATTER, PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY USING GOOGLE TRANSLATE FOR ENGLISH TO SPANISH TRANSLATION WITH THE CLERK. DEFENDANT TARUNKUMAR K. PATEL DBA ALEXIS PARK SAN FRANCISCO IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT BHULABHAI B. PATEL DBA ALEXIS PARK SAN FRANCISCO IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT BHULABHAI B. PATEL DBA ALEXIS PARK SAN FRANCISCO HAS NOT BEEN SERVED AND PROOF OF SERVICE IS STILL REQUIRED. PLAINTIFF IS INFORMED THAT PROOF OF SERVICE IS STILL REQUIRED ON DEFENDANT BHULABHAI B. PATEL DBA ALEXIS PARK SAN FRANCISCO. PLAINTIFF IS INFORMED THAT IF HE IS UNABLE TO SERVE DEFENDANT HE WILL NEED TO DISMISS WITHOUT PREJUDICE DEFENDANT BHULABHAI B. PATEL SO THE MATTER MAY MOVE FORWARD WITH HEARING. NO FURTHER SERVICE IS REQUIRED ON DEFENDANT TARUNKUMAR K. PATEL DBA ALEXIS PARK SAN FRANCISCO. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: D. AU / W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR SPANISH INTERPRETER. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HERNANDEZ, SERGIO AGUILA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-23-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO APR-01-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF SERGIO AGUILA HERNANDEZ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT TARUNKUMAR K. PATEL DBA ALEXIS PARK SF IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT BHULABHAI B. PATEL DBA ALEXIS PARK SF IS NOT PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE FOR DEFENDANT BHULABHAI B. PATEL DBA ALEXIS PARK SF. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE BY DEFENDANT GRANTED -PLANTIFF HAS BEEN ALLOWED TO SEEK A CONTINUANCE BECAUSE OF ATTEMPTS TO SERVE THE OTHER DEFENDANT BHULABHAI PATEL
ORDER CONTINUANCE FOR SPANISH INTERPRETER AND FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
